title: introspection has_hook/hooks_on
manager: Introspection over the hook registry — `has_hook`, `hooks_on` — so code and tooling can ask which hooks are attached where, at runtime. This answers the long-standing "is this transition hooked?" questions as real API, which matters for debugging, for conditional rendering (draw hooked states differently), and for a machine reasoning about its own observability instead of guessing.
cs: has_hook/hooks_on queries over the uniform registry (W6.77); fsl#1251/#1158/#434; feeds hooked-state rendering and tooling.
